description.en: The type of frame objects such as found in tb.tb_frame if tb is a traceback object.

description.en: The type of user-defined functions and functions created by lambda expressions. Raises an auditing event function.__new__ with argument code. The audit event only occurs for direct instantiation of function objects, and is not raised for normal compilation.
